title: Listen: Scott Allan among guests on Off the Ball
summary: Scott Allan joins other guests on the Off the Ball radio show to discuss football topics.
content: The most petty and ill-informed football show on radio.

zh.title: 收听：Scott Allan 在 Off the Ball 广播节目中做客
zh.summary: Scott Allan 与其他嘉宾一起参加 Off the Ball 广播节目讨论足球话题。

title: All three England keepers played there - Carlisle's role in trio's rise
summary: All three of England's goalkeepers under Thomas Tuchel have played for Carlisle United, establishing the west Cumbrian club as a crucial pipeline for elite English keepers to reach the World Cup stage.
content: From west Cumbria to the World Cup, Carlisle is England's goalkeeper factory, with all of Thomas Tuchel's goalkeepers passing through the club.

zh.title: 三位英格兰门将都曾效力于此——卡莱尔在三人崛起中的作用
zh.summary: 托马斯·图赫尔执教下的英格兰三位门将都曾效力于卡莱尔联队，确立了这家坎布里亚西部俱乐部作为精英英格兰门将进入世界杯舞台的关键通道的地位。

title: Dutch royals enjoy two big results in one World Cup day
summary: Members of the Dutch royal family witnessed both the Netherlands and their former colony Curacao play on the same World Cup day, bridging the 5,000-mile distance between the nations.
content: There may be about 5,000 miles between the Netherlands and their former colony Curacao but members of the Dutch royal family managed to see both sides play on Saturday.

zh.title: 荷兰皇室在一个世界杯日享受两场重大比赛
zh.summary: 荷兰皇室成员见证了荷兰和其前殖民地库拉索在同一个世界杯日的比赛，跨越两国之间 5000 英里的距离。

title: Just's rise from Austrian second tier to World Cup breakout star
summary: A Motherwell attacking midfielder has risen from Austrian second-division football to become a breakout star at the World Cup, demonstrating a rapid career trajectory to football's grandest stage.
content: BBC Scotland charts a rapid rise that has taken the Motherwell attacking midfielder from second-division football to the game's grandest stage.

zh.title: Just从奥地利第二级联赛崛起为世界杯突破明星
zh.summary: 一位莫瑟韦尔进攻型中场从奥地利二级足球联赛崛起，成为世界杯上的突破明星，展示了迅速的职业生涯轨迹，登上足球最伟大的舞台。

title: World Cup quiz: Name every Golden Boot winner
summary: A quiz challenging readers to name World Cup Golden Boot winners across all tournaments, testing knowledge of the competition's all-time top goalscorers.
content: How many World Cup top goalscorers from down the years can you name?

zh.title: 世界杯测验：命名每一位金靴奖获得者
zh.summary: 一个测验，挑战读者命名历届世界杯金靴奖获得者，测试对比赛历史最高进球手的了解。

title: Hearts line up Ghuendouz & Celtic consider Duran - gossip
summary: Hearts are positioning to sign winger Ghuendouz, while Celtic track forward Duran. Multiple clubs are linked with a Hibernian midfielder in the current transfer market.
content: Hearts set for winger signing, Celtic track forward and clubs linked with Hibernian midfielder.

zh.title: 哈茨计划签约根多兹，凯尔特人考虑杜兰 - 传言
zh.summary: 哈茨正在为签约边锋根多兹做准备，而凯尔特人则在关注前锋杜兰。多家俱乐部与一名希伯尼安中场球员有关联。

title: Japan run riot as Tunisia eliminated in Renard's first game
summary: Japan dominated Tunisia 4-0 in Herve Renard's inaugural match as Tunisia coach, with striker Ayase Ueda scoring twice. The decisive victory eliminates Tunisia from the 2026 World Cup.
content: Ayase Ueda scores twice to help Japan to a thumping 4-0 win, as Herve Renard's first game in charge of Tunisia ends with his side being eliminated from the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 日本大胜突尼斯，雷纳尔首场比赛突尼斯出局
zh.summary: 日本在埃里韦·雷纳尔担任突尼斯教练的首场比赛中以4:0击败突尼斯，前锋植田步梦连进两球。这场决定性的胜利使突尼斯被淘汰出2026年世界杯。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 14
summary: This interactive guessing game challenges readers to identify an anonymous World Cup player wearing number 14 in as few attempts as possible.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜测世界杯14号球星
zh.summary: 这个互动猜谜游戏挑战读者用尽可能少的尝试次数来识别一名身穿14号球衣的匿名世界杯球员。

title: Goalline technology denies Japan goal by fractions
summary: Tunisia goalkeeper Aymen Dahmen made a crucial save inches from the goal line to deny Japan a goal by the narrowest of margins during their 2026 World Cup match at Estadio Monterrey.
content: Tunisia goalkeeper Aymen Dahmen makes an "unbelievable save" to prevent Japan from doubling their lead by the finest of margins, in their 2026 World Cup match at Estadio Monterrey.

zh.title: 门线判定以毫厘之差拒绝日本进球
zh.summary: 突尼斯门将阿曼·达门在门线附近做出关键扑救，在蒙特雷体育场的2026年世界杯比赛中以极小的差距否决了日本的进球。

title: Meet the record-equalling keeper who helped Curacao make history
summary: Curacao goalkeeper Eloy Room equaled the World Cup record with 15 saves as his island nation secured their first-ever World Cup point against Ecuador. The historic performance underscored Curacao's defensive resilience.
content: Curacao's Eloy Room makes a record-equalling 15 saves to help his tiny island nation to a first World Cup point against Ecuador.

zh.title: 认识打平世界杯纪录并帮助库拉索创造历史的门将
zh.summary: 库拉索门将埃洛伊·鲁姆以15次扑救创造了世界杯纪录，帮助他的岛国在对阵厄瓜多尔的比赛中获得首个世界杯积分。这一历史性表现突显了库拉索的防线韧性。

title: Impenetrable Room inspires Curacao to first World Cup point
summary: Curacao goalkeeper Eloy Room matched the World Cup record for most saves in a single match with a 0-0 draw against Ecuador at Kansas City Stadium under coach Dick Advocaat. The result marked Curacao's first-ever point in World Cup competition.
content: Curacao goalkeeper Eloy Room equals the record for most saves in a World Cup match, as Dick Advocaat's side earn their first ever point in the tournament with a 0-0 draw against Ecuador at the Kansas City Stadium.

zh.title: 无敌鲁姆激励库拉索首获世界杯积分
zh.summary: 库拉索门将埃洛伊·鲁姆在堪萨斯城体育场与厄瓜多尔的比赛中以0-0平局创造了世界杯单场扑救次数纪录，主教练迪克·阿德沃卡特执教。这个结果标志着库拉索在世界杯赛事中的首个积分。

title: Rice feels like he will get an assist at every corner
summary: England midfielder Declan Rice expressed confidence in his set-piece delivery, suggesting he will create an assist from every corner. Rice urged England fans to look forward with optimism as the team prepares for World Cup competition.
content: Declan Rice feels like he will get an assist "every time" he takes a corner - and says England fans should be "excited" for what is to come at the World Cup.

zh.title: 赖斯感觉自己在每个角球都会有助攻
zh.summary: 英格兰中场球员德克兰·赖斯对自己的定位球传中充满信心，认为他将在每个角球中创造助攻。赖斯敦促英格兰球迷在球队为世界杯比赛做准备时保持乐观展望。

title: From factory floor to World Cup star - Germany's super-sub Undav
summary: Deniz Undav has emerged as a key player for Germany at the 2026 World Cup despite being criticized by manager Julian Nagelsmann in the past. His performances demonstrate his ability to deliver under pressure in a major tournament.
content: It was not long ago that his manager Julian Nagelsmann called him out openly - but Deniz Undav is proving himself a key player for Germany at the World Cup.

zh.title: 从工厂到世界杯明星——德国的超级替补乌恩达夫
zh.summary: 丹尼斯·乌恩达夫成为2026年世界杯德国队的关键球员，尽管曾遭到主教练朱利安·那格尔斯曼的批评。他的表现展示了他在大型赛事压力下的出色表现。
